六式定稿 · The Final Set

All six clips rolled from the LOCKED keyframe canon — right-facing, near-arm sword, far-side scabbard, adult proportions. Harvested with phase-aware pose targets, spark-strip, shared-tile quantize, and per-clip scale verification. APPROVED + FULL DENSITY: 97 frames per clip (582 total) — timelines subsample freely for any speed.

一劍 · Light Attack

k1 → k2 → k1

The back-view guard turns INTO the side-view thrust like a natural weight shift — the view-transition question answered well. Purple tip-burst remapped to steel (rage-hue law).

harvested loop · 97 frames @30fps
